---
version: "1.0"

# Enterprise Controls
# Role-based permissions for guardrail overrides, approvals, and compliance actions.
# Generated by /init for enterprise-tier projects. Edit to match your org's roles.
# Read by: approval-workflow skill, risk-score skill, validate skill (governance check).

# ─── Role Definitions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# Roles are abstract. Map them to your team members below.
# Any actor not listed in any role has default-tier permissions only.

roles:
  engineering-lead:
    description: "Engineering leadership — approves architectural and implementation changes."
    members: [] # Add GitHub usernames: ["alice", "bob"]
    permissions:
      - approve_high_risk_tasks
      - approve_breaking_changes
      - override_guardrail: horizontal_layer_pr_blocked
      - override_guardrail: slice_acceptance_criteria_required

  security-lead:
    description: "Security leadership — approves security-sensitive changes."
    members: []
    permissions:
      - approve_high_risk_tasks
      - approve_breaking_changes
      - approve_security_review
      - override_guardrail: security_review_required
      - override_guardrail: secrets_scan_required

  compliance-officer:
    description: "Compliance officer — approves changes under active compliance packs."
    members: []
    permissions:
      - approve_compliance_review
      - override_guardrail: security_review_required
      - view_audit_trail
      - export_compliance_evidence

  hipaa-compliance-officer:
    description: "HIPAA-specific compliance role for ePHI-adjacent changes."
    members: []
    permissions:
      - approve_compliance_review
      - approve_high_risk_tasks
      - view_audit_trail
      - export_compliance_evidence

  pci-compliance-officer:
    description: "PCI DSS-specific compliance role for cardholder data environment changes."
    members: []
    permissions:
      - approve_compliance_review
      - approve_high_risk_tasks
      - view_audit_trail
      - export_compliance_evidence

  platform-engineer:
    description: "Platform / DevOps engineering — approves infrastructure changes."
    members: []
    permissions:
      - approve_infrastructure_changes
      - approve_ci_cd_changes
      - override_guardrail: dependency_vulnerability_scan

  default:
    description: "All team members — no elevated permissions."
    permissions:
      - submit_for_approval
      - view_audit_trail_own_actions

# ─── Approval Requirements ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# Defines which roles must approve each class of change.
# min_count is how many approvers from that role are required.

approval_requirements:
  high_risk_task:
    description: "Tasks flagged as high-risk by the loop or risk-score skill."
    required_approvers:
      - role: engineering-lead
        min_count: 1
    timeout_hours: 8

  breaking_change:
    description: "API contract, schema, or CONTEXT.md breaking changes."
    required_approvers:
      - role: engineering-lead
        min_count: 1
    timeout_hours: 24

  critical_risk_score:
    description: "PRs with risk score >= 75 (critical band)."
    required_approvers:
      - role: security-lead
        min_count: 1
      - role: engineering-lead
        min_count: 1
    timeout_hours: 8

  pii_change:
    description: "Changes to PII storage, processing, or access."
    required_approvers:
      - role: security-lead
        min_count: 1
    timeout_hours: 8

  payment_change:
    description: "Changes to payment processing, billing, or financial calculations."
    required_approvers:
      - role: security-lead
        min_count: 1
    timeout_hours: 8

  infrastructure_change:
    description: "Changes to infrastructure-as-code, CI/CD pipelines, or deployment config."
    required_approvers:
      - role: platform-engineer
        min_count: 1
    timeout_hours: 24

  guardrail_override:
    description: "Any override of a configured guardrail threshold."
    required_approvers:
      - role: engineering-lead
        min_count: 1
    timeout_hours: 24
    justification_required: true
    audit_required: true

  compliance_review:
    description: "Compliance pack review required (risk score >= compliance_review_threshold)."
    required_approvers:
      - role: compliance-officer
        min_count: 1
    timeout_hours: 48

# ─── Guardrail Override Policy ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# Which guardrails can be overridden, by which roles, and under what conditions.
# Overrides are always logged to the audit trail.

guardrail_overrides:
  # Overridable guardrails (with audit)
  horizontal_layer_pr_blocked:
    can_override: true
    authorized_roles: ["engineering-lead"]
    requires_justification: true
    audit_required: true
    description: "Allow a horizontal PR when explicitly justified (e.g., large-scale rename)."

  slice_acceptance_criteria_required:
    can_override: true
    authorized_roles: ["engineering-lead"]
    requires_justification: true
    audit_required: true
    description: "Allow a PR without acceptance criteria for hotfixes."

  handoff_artifact_required_per_slice:
    can_override: true
    authorized_roles: ["engineering-lead"]
    requires_justification: true
    audit_required: true
    description: "Allow a slice to complete without a handoff artifact (e.g., emergency patch)."

  test_coverage_minimum:
    can_override: true
    authorized_roles: ["engineering-lead"]
    requires_justification: true
    audit_required: true
    min_justification_length: 50 # characters
    description: "Allow coverage below threshold. Not for compliance-regulated repositories."
    compliance_pack_restriction: ["hipaa", "pci-dss"] # Cannot override when these packs are active

  security_review_required:
    can_override: true
    authorized_roles: ["security-lead"]
    requires_justification: true
    audit_required: true
    compliance_pack_restriction: ["hipaa", "pci-dss", "soc2"]

  # Non-overridable guardrails
  secrets_scan_required:
    can_override: false
    description: "Secrets scanning cannot be disabled. Non-negotiable."

  breaking_change_approval_required:
    can_override: false
    description: "Breaking change approval cannot be bypassed."

  tracer_bullet_first_required:
    can_override: false
    description: "Tracer bullet discipline cannot be bypassed."

# ─── Audit Trail Policy ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

audit_policy:
  retention_days: 365 # Default retention. Override per compliance pack.
  immutable: true # Audit log entries are never modified or deleted.
  index_maintained: true # .velocity/artifacts/audit/index.md is kept up to date.
  required_events: # These events must always be logged regardless of other config.
    - guardrail.override
    - guardrail.block
    - approval.requested
    - approval.granted
    - approval.rejected
    - validate.result
    - loop.task.complete
    - loop.task.paused

# ─── Compliance Pack Activation ────────────────────────────────────────────

compliance_packs:
  active: [] # Add packs to activate: ["soc2", "hipaa", "pci-dss", "iso27001"]
  # When active, the compliance pack's controls supplement (not replace) the base guardrails.
  # risk_score multipliers are applied automatically when packs are listed here.

# ─── Approval Mode ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

approval_mode: in_session
# Options:
#   in_session  — Developer approves inside the AI assistant during the session
#   pr_review   — Approval is recorded via GitHub PR review (requires GitHub integration)
---
